tools.name: ai_search_jobs
tools.description: Intelligent job search using natural language. Interprets the user query and finds matching jobs on Magneto365.

tools.name: get_filters
tools.description: Get available filters for job search on Magneto365: locations, categories, work modalities, experience, salary ranges, contract types and more.

tools.name: get_job_detail
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific job listing on Magneto365 by its URL slug.
